title: Clean column value
excerpt: It would be very useful if in custom automations you could eliminate or clean the values ​​of another type of column in addition to the “people” column

posts.author: Daniel.Ramirez (Daniel Ramirez)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very useful if in custom automations you could eliminate or clean the values ​​of another type of column in addition to the “people” column

posts.author: Daminaio (dectatang)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature suggestion has real potential! Being able to clear values from columns other than just the “people” column in custom automations would greatly enhance its usefulness. Looking forward to seeing this functionality added.
